nd explain
their effects succinctly. Gada : This means a Mace. Here
all the planets should occupy adjacent Kendras i.e. they may be
(i) in the 1st and 4th houses, (ii)inthe4thand 7thhouses,(iii)in7th
and 10th houses, and (iv) in 10th and 1st houses. Effects : One
who is born with the Gada yoga will be wealthy, will perform
sacrifices and be intent on amassing wealth. Sakala : All planets
should be in the 1st and the 7th houses. Effects: The person
concerned will be a coach-driver, sickly and having a bad wife.
Vihaga QtPakun. It means a bird. All planets in this yoga should
be in the 4th and 10th houses : Effects : The person will earn
his living as a messenger, will be of wandering habits and quarrel-
some. tSringdfaka : All planets should be in the 1st, 5th and
9th houses. Effects : The subject will be swect-tongued and be
happy in his old age. Hala or Plough : All planets should be
in (i) 2nd, 6th and 10th houses, (ii) 3rd, 7th and 11th houses, or
<iii) 4th, 8th and 12th houses.
